_sources.generator: Estimated diesel genset 2.6 kgCO2e/hour at average load

_sources.meal_mixed: Poore & Nemecek 2018, Science — mixed omnivore meal 3.5 kgCO2e

_sources.meal_vegan: Poore & Nemecek 2018, Science — vegan meal 1.5 kgCO2e

_sources.electronics_large: IVF Sweden 2007 — large electronics (TV/laptop) lifecycle ~200 kgCO2e
